zh.lifeSummary: 當John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt於1266年7月17日出生時，他的父親Guy de Botetourt32歲，母親ADA De Botetourt26歲。他與Maud fitz Thomas結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1305年被列為member of parliament。他去世於1324年11月25日享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt于1266年7月17日出生时，他的父亲Guy de Botetourt32岁，母亲ADA De Botetourt26岁。他与Maud fitz Thomas结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1305年被列为member of parliament。他去世于1324年11月25日享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: John

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt was born on 17 July 1266, his father, Guy de Botetourt, was 32 and his mother, ADA De Botetourt, was 26. He married Maud fitz Thomas. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. In 1305, his occupation is listed as member of parliament. He died on 25 November 1324, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt est né le 17 juillet 1266, son père, Guy de Botetourt, avait 32 ans et sa mère, ADA De Botetourt, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Maud fitz Thomas. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. En 1305, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1324, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt am 17. Juli 1266 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy de Botetourt 32 und seine Mutter ADA De Botetourt 26. Er hat Maud fitz Thomas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1305 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. November 1324 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt è nato il il 17 luglio 1266, il suo padre, Guy de Botetourt, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, ADA De Botetourt, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Maud fitz Thomas. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1305, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament. Morì il 25 novembre 1324, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourtが1266年7月17日に生まれた時，父Guy de Botetourtは32歳，母ADA De Botetourtは26歳であった。Maud fitz Thomasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1305年，職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1324年11月25日に58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt(이)가 1266년 7월 17일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de Botetourt(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 ADA De Botetourt(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Maud fitz Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1305년, 그의 직업은 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1324년 11월 25일 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.17 July 1266–25 November 1324: 17 de julho de 1266–25 de novembro de 1324
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt nasceu em 17 de julho de 1266, seu pai, Guy de Botetourt, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, ADA De Botetourt, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud fitz Thomas. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1305, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament. Ele faleceu em 25 de novembro de 1324, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt родился 17 июля 1266 г., его отцу по имени Guy de Botetourt было 32 года, а матери, которую звали ADA De Botetourt, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud fitz Thomas. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1305 году он работал по профессии member of parliament. Он умер 25 ноября 1324 г. в возрасте 58 лет.

es.17 July 1266–25 November 1324: 17 de julio de 1266–25 de noviembre de 1324
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Botetourt 1st Baron Botetourt nació el 17 de julio de 1266, su papá, Guy de Botetourt, tenía 32 años y su mamá, ADA De Botetourt, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Maud fitz Thomas. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1305, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament. Murió el 25 de noviembre de 1324, a la edad de 58 años.
